candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The following is a sample of butterfly wingspans measured in millimeters. What wingspan is the 75th percentile? (Final Answer is a value)
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: \answer{39} The third quartile is the same as the 75th percentile. 39 is the wingspan for the 75th percentile.
